evals.name: complete-confluence-compatible-prd
evals.prompt: Write a PRD for a saved-payment experience from these complete notes. Sponsor: Payments Director. Product owner: Payments PM. Priority: high. Budget: 2026 Payments roadmap. Target release: 2026-10-01. Users repeatedly entering card details on mobile abandon or slow down payments. Actors: returning card-paying users and Customer Care. User JTBD: when returning to pay, users want to select a masked saved card so they can complete payment faster. Expected outcome: faster completed repeat payments. Success metric: median completion time falls from 74 seconds to 45 seconds. Quality guardrail: no full card number is stored. Business goal: increase completed repeat-card payments from 68% to 75% within eight weeks. Outcome KPI source: payments funnel dashboard reviewed weekly. Strategic dependency: PSP token lifecycle events. Constraint: maximum five visible cards. Preliminary Engineering opinion: tokenization is available. Preliminary Legal/Compliance opinion: requested. Design discovery: https://figma.example/saved-cards. Support needs: troubleshooting guidance for expired or declined cards. Open non-blocking assumption: Amex is excluded from this release. Write the machine-first PRD in English.
evals.expected_output: A Confluence-compatible PRD with visible Metadata, Need definition, Actors, Objectives with a complete JTBD catalog, Success metrics with outcome KPIs and quality guardrails, strategic dependencies, constraints, feasibility red flags, design discovery, open questions, and support readiness. It starts with status draft.
expectations: The PRD has a visible Metadata section with stable IDs for status, sponsor, owner, budget, Legal/Compliance, Engineering, target release, and priority
The JTBD row includes persona, canonical job statement, expected outcome, success metric, quality guardrail, priority, and notes
Outcome KPIs and quality guardrails are separate sections
Stable English IDs are present for each canonical section and table row
The PRD does not include a use-case catalog, RACI, backlog, or detailed implementation specification
metadata.status is draft

evals.name: incomplete-material-remains-draft
evals.prompt: Create a PRD for a shared workspace idea. Sales reports that enterprise customers want collaboration, but there is no confirmed sponsor, owner, target user segment, measurable goal, or decision about whether the scope is shared folders only or also roles and audit logs. Engineering and Legal have not been consulted. Do not invent answers. Produce the PRD in draft state and make the uncertainties visible.
evals.expected_output: The agent produces a structured draft without inventing missing information, records the unresolved scope and ownership questions, and keeps status draft.
expectations: The PRD is created in draft state despite incomplete information
Missing sponsor, owner, audience, goals, and preliminary consultations are visible as open questions or justified not-applicable values
The conflicting scope proposals are preserved as an unresolved question
The agent does not invent metrics, ownership, actors, or feasibility conclusions

evals.name: review-ready-status-transition
evals.prompt: The existing PRD has a visible Metadata section with status draft. Its context, sponsor, Product owner, and problem statement are clear enough to share with stakeholders. It still has two non-blocking open questions about a future design decision. I have reviewed it and say it is good enough and ready for review. Change the status only. Do not publish it or modify any other content.
evals.expected_output: The agent changes only metadata.status from draft to review. Non-blocking open questions remain unchanged and no publication is offered.
expectations: metadata.status changes from draft to review
Non-blocking open questions do not prevent the transition
No other PRD content is changed
The agent does not publish or offer publication

evals.name: review-blocked-missing-entry-criteria
evals.prompt: The existing PRD is marked draft. It contains an idea and some technical notes, but no confirmed sponsor, Product owner, or clear problem statement. I say it is ready for review. Do not change the status yet; identify the missing review-entry information and ask targeted questions.
evals.expected_output: The agent keeps status draft, explains that review readiness is not established, and asks for the missing sponsor, owner, and problem definition without inventing them.
expectations: metadata.status remains draft
The agent identifies missing context, sponsor, owner, or problem clarity as the reason
The agent asks targeted clarification questions
The agent does not infer values from technical notes

evals.name: downstream-detail-boundary
evals.prompt: Write a PRD from these notes. Include the need, actors, JTBD, goals, metrics, and risks, but keep the following out of the PRD: endpoint schemas, database tables, retry algorithms, detailed use cases, acceptance criteria, deployment steps, and backlog tickets. Mention only the high-level constraint that an existing indexed read model must be available.
evals.expected_output: The PRD contains product outcomes and high-level constraints while excluding detailed implementation, use-case, acceptance, deployment, and backlog content.
expectations: The PRD contains no detailed endpoint, database, retry, deployment, acceptance-criteria, use-case, or backlog content
The high-level indexed-read-model dependency is retained
The PRD remains organized according to the Confluence-compatible hierarchy

evals.name: publication-handoff
evals.prompt: The PRD has just been written and validated. Ask me whether I want to create a Confluence page. Do not choose a publication language until I answer yes.
evals.expected_output: The agent asks for explicit confirmation to create a Confluence page and hands publication to confluence-librarian without asking for or assuming a language before confirmation.
expectations: The agent asks whether to create a Confluence page
The agent does not publish without explicit confirmation
The agent does not choose or ask for a publication language before confirmation
The agent delegates confirmed publication to confluence-librarian
